report: NOVA System Health Audit — M15.2 Code-Level Validation

unit_tests.details: All 1100+ tests pass across 23 workspace crates

nova_kernel.notes: Kernel bootstrap, event bus, config, logger, consent, egress gate, module registry

nova_memory.notes: Real SQLite + AES-256-GCM encrypted storage, CRUD, provenance, import/export

nova_search.notes: Hybrid lexical+semantic search backed by real SQLite FTS

nova_ai.notes: MockProvider used in all tests/demo. CandleProvider (real GGUF) exists but never instantiated. No real model files in workspace.

nova_voice.notes: All providers mock: audio capture, VAD, wake word, ASR, TTS, output, noise filter. No real microphone/speaker I/O.

nova_vision.notes: Image loading/decoding/hashing=REAL. All AI analysis (OCR, caption, detection, face, quality, color, tagging)=100% MOCK.

nova_knowledge.notes: Entity extraction, graph, reasoning, ranking, persistence=REAL. Embedding provider=MOCK.

nova_automation.notes: DefaultActionExecutor returns canned strings. No real app launch, notification, or command execution.

nova_plugin_sdk.notes: 3 demo plugins (hello, memory_reader, auto_worker) run in-process. Sandbox checks work correctly. Plugin lifecycle events published.

nova_plugin_host.notes: KernelModule skeleton only. No plugin isolation or out-of-process hosting.

nova_comms.notes: KernelModule skeleton only. No Twilio/email/SMS integration.

nova_device.notes: Device info, platform detection, provider/service registry

nova_security.notes: Real ed25519, X25519, AES-256-GCM, HKDF, OsRng. No mocks.

nova_pairing.notes: Real X25519 key exchange, real QR code rendering. No real device-to-device communication.

nova_transport.notes: Real TCP/UDP code. Demo never starts transport. 3 tests bind/connect to real sockets.

nova_windows_agent.notes: RealWindowsProvider defined (taskkill, shutdown, clipboard, etc.) but NEVER used in tests/demo. All coverage via MockWindowsProvider.

nova_sync.notes: Clipboard sync, shared memory, activity trail — all in-memory. No real network sync.

nova_cross_device.notes: AndroidAdapter=entirely mock. Discovery returns empty. All pairing/dispatch/clipboard/file-transfer simulated in-memory. Real crypto used for encryption.

nova_ffi.notes: C-ABI bindings. Compiles but no runtime tests.

nova_jni.notes: 16 JNI entry points. Cannot test without Android device/emulator.

nova_demo.notes: Real kernel, memory, search, egress, knowledge. Mock/simulated: AI, voice, vision, automation, cross-device, Windows agent.

nova_desktop.notes: egui/eframe GUI app. Compiles but not launched in CI.
